messages.content:
Welcome to Luxe Watches.

Luxe Watches are a leading pre-owned Luxury Watch & Jewellery Boutique

To Buy a watch our Sales Manager Charlie can help with this via WhatsApp +447712000111 

To Sell  a watch please follow this link https://www.luxewatches.co.uk/sell-your-watch/

Selling a watch you can WhatsApp us on +447979 491 284 Please provide him with images of the watch, papers and your anticipated price.

Regards
